backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile management (get, save, register, membership check) with Internet Identity-based access control enforced via an AccessControl mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features for the Organisation page, including Party Presidents/General Secretaries table, Prime Ministers table, and other historical leadership tables with styling and Wikipedia links.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure and content.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, accent, chart colors, sidebar) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root into a div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with seven routes (Home, History, Ideology, Organisation, Chhatra League, Contact, Members) all wrapped in the shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer with party branding/emblem, navigation links, external reference links (official site and Wikipedia), and a caffeine.ai attribution line.
frontend/src/components/IdeologyPillar.t: Reusable card component for displaying an ideological pillar with an icon, name, and description, supporting four color variants (green, red, gold, teal) via an OKLCH color map.
frontend/src/components/KeyFactsStrip.ts: Horizontal strip component displaying four static party facts (founded, headquarters, ideology, student wing) in a responsive grid on a dark green background.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Simple layout wrapper composing Navbar, main content area, and Footer in a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive fixed navbar with scroll-aware styling, active route highlighting, mobile menu toggle, and Internet Identity login/logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/NavigationCard.t: A styled card component that links to a given route, displaying an icon, title, description, and a color-accented 'Learn More' label.
frontend/src/components/OrgChart.tsx: Recursive organizational chart component that renders a tree of nodes with vertical/horizontal connectors, styled differently by depth level.
frontend/src/components/TimelineEvent.ts: Displays a single timeline entry with a year badge, title, description, and a connecting line, supporting left/right side alignment.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and login status state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching the caller's user profile, membership status, and registering a new member profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/utility layers with OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ChhatraLeague.tsx: Renders a page about Bangladesh Chhatra League, displaying a timeline of historical contributions (1948–1971) and a list of notable leaders with external Wikipedia links.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Renders a contact/membership page showing party headquarters address, phone, and email, along with membership information and a link to the official Awami League website.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Renders a detailed timeline page of Awami League and Bangladeshi history from 1947 onward, with rich text descriptions and external Wikipedia links for each event.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the homepage with a hero banner, party emblem, navigation cards linking to key sections (History, Ideology, Organisation, Chhatra League), and a timeline of major achievements.
frontend/src/pages/Ideology.tsx: Renders the ideology and policies page, presenting the four pillars of Mujibism (Bengali Nationalism, Democracy, Secularism, Socialism) and policy sections covering economy, education, social welfare, and foreign policy.
frontend/src/pages/MembersArea.tsx: React page for a members-only area that handles Internet Identity login, new member registration with a display name form, and renders a dashboard with announcements, resources, and directory tabs for authenticated members.
frontend/src/pages/Organisation.tsx: React page displaying the Awami League's organizational structure via an org chart, hierarchical level descriptions, affiliated party wings table, and a historical table of party presidents.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive parameters from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), oklch-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins enabled.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 13) tracking the Awami League website's architecture notes, implemented features, known issues, and referenced source materials used to build the site's content.
